60 days, you're gonna make another offer to do a personal visit. Pick up the phone. I want to come see you today or tomorrow or I'm gonna be there Friday. I'd like to come by and see if you're gonna be around. I'm visiting another client. You probably remember that strategy. I'm gonna be one block from your office. Can I come by and see you? Now if they're out of state, you're gonna set this up for another time. I'm gonna be in your area next Monday or Tuesday. I'd like to fly out to meet you again. The personal visit is like a gift. It's a personal visit offer. It doesn't mean they're gonna take you up on it. I have people say, I don't have time for this. I'm like, what do you mean? Most people are not gonna let you do it anyway. And if they do, they're saying, hey, come sell me. Come finish me. Help me out. I need your product. I need your service and you're getting my attention. This is 60 days. Now 60 days of relentless follow-up. I promise you it's paying off. We might have to go further than this and I'm happy to help you. Stay with the follow-up.
